_publications._publicationTitle: Modelling neurofibromatosis type 1 tibial dysplasia and its treatment with lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: The μCT analysis indicated that BV/TV within the bone marrow cavity was two-fold higher in the lovastatin-treated mice than in untreated mice (0.108 ± 0.043 versus 0.051 ± 0.005)
details: Lovastatin treatment improved BV/TV in bone marrow cavity from 0.051 ± 0.005 to 0.108 ± 0.043 at day 7, and from 0.168 ± 0.16 to 0.329 ± 0.089 at day 14
